# Sprint 4.1 Application Capabilities

**Project:** urban-parking-optimization-system
**Sprint:** Sprint 4. Driver Application
**Objective:** Develop a driver-facing mobile application to reduce search time by influencing driver decisions before congestion occurs.

## Description
Design and implement application capabilities, including real-time availability and pricing visualization, predictive reservation suggestions, and cost comparison.

## Deliverable
Application capabilities design document
